title: American Beef Burger
description: A classic American-style beef burger, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal. Juicy beef patties topped with cheese, lettuce, tomato, and a slice of onion.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Divide the ground beef into 4 equal portions and shape each into a ball.
3. Flatten each ball into a patty about 3/4 inch thick.
4. Season the patties with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
6. Meanwhile, toast the buns on the grill or in a toaster.
7. Assemble the burgers by spreading a slice of cheese on the bottom bun, followed by a patty, a few slices of onion, a lettuce leaf, a tomato slice, and finally the top bun.
9. If desired, top with ketchup, mayonnaise, or other condiments.
10. Serve with your favorite sides, such as fries or a salad.
